title: Tuscan Apple Strata
description: A simple breakfast or brunch dish featuring layers of bread, apples, and stracciatella cheese.
instructions: 2. Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices and layer half of them in a 9x13 inch baking dish.
3. Top the bread with the diced apples and shredded stracciatella cheese.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs and a pinch of salt.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the bread and apple layer.
6. Top with the remaining bread slices.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
